title: helichrysum selaginifolium
intro: Helichrysum selaginifolium, also known as the yellow mountain daisy or mountain everlast, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of South Africa. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum selaginifolium include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Helichrysum selaginifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which are used in traditional medicine and aromatherapy to harness its therapeutic properties.
